diagrams.title: System V Shared Memory Lifecycle
diagrams.description: Shows the complete lifecycle of shared memory from creation to deletion with all system calls
diagrams.purpose: Understand the sequence of operations for shared memory programming

diagrams.title: Shared Memory vs Pipe Data Flow
diagrams.description: Compares data flow between shared memory (direct) and pipe (through kernel)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why shared memory is faster than pipe-based IPC

diagrams.title: Multiple Process Attachment
diagrams.description: Shows multiple processes attaching to the same shared memory segment
diagrams.purpose: Understand how multiple processes share the same memory region

diagrams.title: mmap() with MAP_SHARED
diagrams.description: Demonstrates memory mapping with shared flag for IPC
diagrams.purpose: Understand how file mapping enables IPC
